judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the core required actions: remove contaminated clothing, wash skin with soap and water, and seek medical attention. However, it adds unsupported details like a 15–20 minute rinse and avoiding neutralizing agents/ointments, and it weakens the source-required escalation by saying to seek care only if irritation persists instead of for any confirmed skin exposure.

  "short_rationale": "Includes the core required actions: remove contaminated clothing, wash skin with soap and water, and seek medical attention. However, it adds unsupported details like a 15–20 minute rinse and avoiding neutralizing agents/ointments, and it weakens the source-required escalation by saying to seek care only if irritation persists instead of for any confirmed skin exposure."
